children.name: [follow_up] CASE_01: 异常场景一：线上回复英文-It normal
parameters:
{'Case_ID': 'CASE_01', 'Target_Agent': 'follow_up', 'Session_Key': 'CHAT_A', '场景描述': '异常场景一：线上回复英文-It normal', 'Input_Query': '倒出来就比较多', 'Dynamic_Inputs': '{
  "patientId": 4017225,
  "externalUserId": "wmfoS8CgAA0PggTgMSpzKz6gBy6noyFw",
  "messages": "[{\"role\":\"user\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"怎么感觉上周开的药，舌苔变厚，我今天药吃完，没吃舌苔好多了\"}],\"time\":\"2025-12-22 16:12:41\"},{\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"舌苔影响因素太多了\"}],\"time\":\"2025-12-22 16:16:28\"},{\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"你其他症状感觉怎么样\"}],\"time\":\"2025-12-22 16:16:33\"},{\"role\":\"user\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"其他还好，舌苔重，容易口气\"}],\"time\":\"2025-12-22 16:20:20\"},{\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"给医生看一下舌苔吧\"}],\"time\":\"2025-12-22 16:22:44\"},{\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"问问为什么只有舌苔这样\"}],\"time\":\"2025-12-22 16:22:50\"},{\"role\":\"user\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"这次药重量没有比之前多，但是明显量比较多，是不是之前药重量不够\"}],\"time\":\"2026-01-01 19:24:55\"},{\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"药品量和药材种类有关呢\"}],\"time\":\"2026-01-01 19:25:17\"},{\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"这次药材吸水后体积会大一些\"}],\"time\":\"2026-01-01 19:25:24\"},{\"role\":\"user\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"倒出来就比较多\"}],\"time\":\"2026-01-01 19:25:47\"}]",
  "weComName": "陈华伟（脾胃病）-13178190827",
  "requestChannel": "企微",
